summary: Pristine soundboard capture of a scorching mid‑80s set featuring a monster Dark Star, fiery Help>Slip>Franklin’s and killer Rooster.
review: This recording delivers crystal‑clear soundboard quality that lets the band's incendiary performance shine. Highlights include a blazing Dark Star, an unstoppable Help>Slip>Franklin’s sequence, big‑room bluesy jams on Big Railroad Blues and Jack Straw, plus a standout Rooster with guest harmonica. The second set flows flawlessly and Jerry's magical tone tops it all.

ai_rating.rationale: Overwhelmingly positive fan commentary on both the musical performance (standout jams, fire‑hot improvisations) and the pristine soundboard recording; no criticism noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear mix, sweet tonal balance, no reported dropouts or muddiness; captures the band’s dynamics with high fidelity.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set especially stellar with seamless transitions and sustained high energy; overall set maintains a hot, synchronized vibe throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Tone described as magical and shredding; on fire the whole night.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent praised for finding the perfect keyboard mix.
